headline: HUBBELL INC (NYSE:HUBB) Screens as a Quality Stock With Durable Competitive Advantages
summary: Quality investing analysis highlights HUBBELL INC (HUBB) with strong ROIC, consistent growth, low debt, and excellent cash conversion, making it a durable long-term hold.
